settings.label: WhatsApp number (digits only, with country code)
settings.info: Used for wa.me/ links across the site. Format: 919967543087 (no + sign, no spaces).

settings.label: WhatsApp display text
settings.info: Human-readable number shown in footer and mobile nav.

settings.label: Default OG share image
settings.info: Used when no page-specific image is available. Recommended: 1200x630px.

settings.label: Enable currency converter
settings.info: Display-only price converter (INR / USD / GBP / CAD / AED) for international visitors — a chip in the header lets them browse in their own currency. Shopify checkout always stays in Indian Rupees; this setting never changes what a customer is actually charged. Turn off instantly (no redeploy needed) if the exchange-rate service ever misbehaves — every price reverts to its normal server-rendered INR display with nothing else affected.
